programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell visit properties in Birkenhead, Paisley and Madeley Heath, Staffordshire, talking to their new owners about their plans

programme.title: Crimewatch Roadshow
programme.desc: Rav Wilding and Michelle Ackerley present appeals for help with unsolved cases. Reporter John-Paul Davies is out and about with stories from across the UK

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland
programme.desc: Paul Coll visits Coll, where he meets crofter Angus Kennedy, who lived and worked away but has returned to the land of his childhood. Paul also visits the owner of Breachacha Castle, Nicolas Maclean Bristol, a descendant of the ancient MacLeans of Coll, whose history on the island goes back to the 14th century. The island's population has slumped in recent years to just 200 people, but Nicolas runs a charity on the island that encourages young volunteers to come and work here from all over the world and so this tiny, remote island has a distinctly Cosmopolitan feel to it

programme.title: Coronavirus: Scotland's Response
programme.desc: All the latest developments as Scotland responds to the coronavirus pandemic, plus answers to the many questions you have during these unprecedented times

programme.desc: Margherita Taylor goes rural property-shopping in the Yorkshire Dales with a retired head teacher who has £400,000 to invest in her leap to the country and has signed up her daughter to help her with the decision making. programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Naga Munchetty and Charlie Stayt present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell visit properties in Birkenhead, Paisley and Madeley Heath, Staffordshire, talking to their new owners about their plans

programme.title: Crimewatch Roadshow
programme.desc: Rav Wilding and Michelle Ackerley present appeals for help with unsolved cases. Reporter John-Paul Davies is out and about with stories from across the UK

programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: In Birmingham, the investigators crack down on the callous travel agent ripping off British holidaymakers, taking their money but never booking their flights. In light of the story of one limo driving a school party of 11-year-olds bursting into flames, there's also some spot-checking on luxury limos being driven in London

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Experts Thomas Forrester and Kate Bliss offer advice as contestants head out into the pouring rain in Shrewsbury to secure items of potential profit under the gavel, where auctioneer Philip Serrell awaits. Love is in the air for presenter Christina Trevanion as she explains how to flirt using a fan

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts the quiz in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single 'impossible' answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: Nick Knowles challenges artists to make something amazing for the homes of people they've never met. Today's buyers live in Whitstable and have £750 to spend on a seaside-themed masterpiece

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor goes rural property-shopping in the Yorkshire Dales with a retired head teacher who has £400,000 to invest in her leap to the country and has signed up her daughter to help her with the decision making. Away from a high-energy house hunt, Margherita discovers how one Dales company has recently been instrumental in reviving Britain's hand-made piano heritage, an echo of production glory days during the 1920s

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Married couple Marcus and Paul are paired with chefs Ellis Barrie and Anna Haugh in the fast-and-furious cookery contest. Paul does most of the cooking in their home and he's keen for Marcus to get more involved. The winner will be decided in a hectic 10-Minute Challenge where the chefs must cook against the clock to produce show stopping dishes under pressure. Rylan Clark-Neal hosts

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Leather expert Suzie Fletcher undertakes the repair of a treasured toy horse, while metal expert Dominic Chinea's knowledge is called upon to rejuvenate a vintage lawnmower. Also receiving attention is a delicately carved set of clay sculptures

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Comic Relief 2021
programme.desc: Lenny Henry, Davina McCall, Paddy McGuinness, Alesha Dixon and David Tennant preside as stars of stage, screen and the movies entertain the nation with hilarious sketches, live performances, big surprises and stunning music acts in a bid to raise much-needed cash for good causes at home and across the world. Highlights include Michael Sheen, Anna Friel and Keira Knightley in the greatest disaster movie never made, the hosts of Top Gear facing interrogation by their most savage critics to date and Dawn French back as Geraldine Granger, joined by the Rev Kate Bottley. Fans of Fleabag and Normal People get a confessional close-up as the stars of two of TV's biggest shows meet for a mash up like no other, Alex Scott and Jermaine Jenas take part in the world's largest and longest Red Nose and Spoon Race and Tim Vine rewards the men and women of the UK's military forces by spreading a smile. Five comedians have just 24 hours to perfect their opera voices under the watchful eye of their mento

programme.title: Comic Relief 2021
programme.desc: Jason Manford and Amanda Holden continue the Comic Relief extravaganza with special guests, comedy, and the chance for viewers to win a number of once-in-a-lifetime prizes. With music by Rag'n'Bone Man, and Joel Corry and RAYE

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Bank Balance
programme.desc: Gino D'Acampo and his son Luci compete in this special edition of the game show, stacking the gold bars on the balance board in a bid to win up to £100,000 for charity. But if they have answered incorrectly, the bars they stack will amount to nothing - and only serve to add further weight to the already precarious board, which could collapse at any second and leave them with nothing

programme.title: Billy Monger's Big Red Nose Day Challenge
programme.desc: In April 2017 the professional racing driver was seriously injured in a collision that resulted in both of his legs being amputated. Already used to pushing the limits of what can be achieved, Billy now pushes himself to the limit as he takes on a truly unforgettable challenge - walking, kayaking and cycling 140 miles in the name of charity. His trek begins at the Millennium Bridge in Newcastle-upon-Tyne, ultimately heading to Brands Hatch in Kent. Before he starts, the 21-year-old receives words of encouragement from Jose Mourinho, manager of his beloved Tottenham Hotspur, and along the route is joined by a host of celebrity supporters including Cheryl, Zoe Ball, Chris Ramsey, Dan Walker and Vick Hope

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present a round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by guests Sabrina Ghayour, Tom Booton and Richard Curtis. Olly Smith joins by video link, and selects wines to accompany the meals prepared in the studio

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts this celebrity edition of the kitchen duel, which sees actor Stephen Mangan squaring up against barrister and TV judge Robert Rinder in a battle of the pots and pans. Paired with chefs Jeremy Pang and Ellis Barrie, they must create dishes from their £5.00 bag of ingredients in just 20 minutes - and with everything from a spicy noodle soup to a massive mushroom vol-au-vent on offer, it promises to be a close call

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Dan Walker is joined by Karen Carney and Dion Dublin to look ahead to the sixth round of the FA Cup

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp challenges two teams to search for bargains at an antiques fair in the grounds of Kedleston Hall, Derbyshire. John Cameron and Tim Weeks offer expert advice

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Scotland v Italy (Kick-off 2.15pm). All the action from the match in the fifth round of fixtures, held at BT Murrayfield. Scotland have won the last nine meetings between the sides and will expect to extend that run today given their superior form in this year's championship. With analysis from John Barclay and Jeremy Guscott and commentary by Andrew Cotter, Brian Moore and Andy Nicol

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents a round-up of the classified results and this afternoon's news from the EFL and Scotland

programme.title: Celebrity Mastermind
programme.desc: John Humphrys invites Amanda Abbington, Rick Edwards, Richard Blackwood and Laura Tobin to take to the black chair. In the first round, they are put to the test on their chosen specialist subjects - Phoebe from Friends, An American Werewolf in London, Bon Jovi, and the octopus. The second round sees them tackling general knowledge questions in a bid to carry off the commemorative trophy

programme.title: Catchpoint
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts a new family-friendly game show combining physical fun and an exciting question mechanic, as contestants have to think fast as they answer questions while trying to catch balls of various sizes dropped from the studio ceiling, with a variety of entertaining rounds and a cash prize at stake

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Danny Dyer hosts the game show, which sees an engaged couple of teachers from Essex answer questions that combine knowledge, strategy and luck. They hope to put the prize money towards a new home for themselves and their baby daughter

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: France v Wales (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the match in the fifth round of fixtures, held at Stade de France. Les Bleus clinched a 27-23 victory when the sides met at Principality Stadium last year, but Wales prevailed 24-19 on their last visit here in 2019, and should head into this match in a confident mood after easily beating rivals England 40-24 in the third round of fixtures. With analysis from Sam Warburton, Martin Johnson and Thomas Castaignede, and commentary by Eddie Butler, Jonathan Davies and Benjamin Kayser

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Brighton & Hove Albion v Newcastle United. Gary Lineker presents highlights of the Premier League match at Amex Stadium. Both teams were in need of points to boost their chances of avoiding relegation, and it was Brighton who were comfortable 3-0 victors when the sides met at St James' Park in September. Plus, a look back at Friday's clash between Fulham and Leeds United at Craven Cottage

programme.title: Match of the Day: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Dan Walker presents action from today's sixth-round ties - Bournemouth v Southampton at Vitality Stadium and Everton v Manchester City at Goodison Park. Bournemouth were the only Championship side remaining in the competition but will have been hoping to make home advantage count against their South Coast rivals, while the Citizens were looking to emulate their 3-1 away win over Everton in the league last month

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Limboland
programme.desc: The comedian muses on people's expectations of happiness in a performance recorded at the Hammersmith Apollo. He shares the story of a disastrous family trip to see the Northern Lights, recalls a meeting with Paul McCartney that did not go as expected and performs a heart-rending country and western ballad on the nature of love

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Danny Dyer hosts the game show, which sees an engaged couple of teachers from Essex answer questions that combine knowledge, strategy and luck. They hope to put the prize money towards a new home for themselves and their baby daughter

programme.title: I Can't Say My Name: Stammering in the Spotlight
programme.desc: BBC producer Felicity Baker has a stammer that she has spent her whole life trying to hide. She struggles to say her own name. Now she is stepping out in front of the camera for the first time to talk about what it is like to live with the condition - and she soon finds she is not alone. She meets a rugby player who blames his stammer for his aggressive behaviour on the pitch, a rapper who found music stopped him stammering and the comedy star Michael Palin, whose father stammered but never ever spoke about it

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: As the government faces mounting criticism that well-connected people made millions out of Britain's PPE crisis, Panorama investigates who won out. More than £12billion was spent in the first six months of the pandemic on contracts to provide personal protective equipment. Reporter Richard Bilton meets one man who made £40million on a deal, and speaks to others who felt ignored in favour of less experienced suppliers. As the government refuses to reveal the full details of all its so-called VIP deals, the programme reveals the high-profile connections to one lucrative contract

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Thousands of schools have been totally or partially destroyed during the Syrian conflict, which began ten years ago this month. Iqra School in Aleppo was one of them, bombed by a fighter jet in 2013. Some pupils were killed immediately and more died of horrific injuries soon after. A BBC Panorama team was filming in a children's hospital nearby and captured the desperate attempts to save lives after the attack. Supporters of the Syrian regime falsely claimed that these scenes had been faked. Eight years later, Panorama meets survivors and relatives of the dead to discover how profoundly their lives have changed as a result of that day.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: David offers Nate some advice. Marlon and Rhona are proud. The Woolpack has a new name above its door

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: When Alina confesses she has fallen for him, Tyrone is overwhelmed. As Natasha returns from London, Nick is disappointed to realise his time with Sam has come to an end. Angered by Tracy's comments, Cathy posts her own views online about the McDonalds' fundraising efforts

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The body of 19-year-old apprentice electrician Dennis Bayliss is discovered washed up on the shore of a North Northumberland rural estate. The victim turns out to be the estranged son of Steph and Rob Bayliss who are left crippled by his death, having lost him once already when he abandoned them to seek out his biological father, Thomas Walken, who just happens to run a salmon farm on the spot where the body was found. Vera is forced to look closer at the strained relationships of Dennis's two families in order to find the truth about his death

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Roy Grace's career is at rock bottom and is in the last chance saloon running enquiries into long-forgotten cold cases with little prospect of success. Then he is approached by colleague DS Glen Branson to help investigate the disappearance of a Brighton property developer, who vanished without a trace on his stag night. Crime drama, starring John Simm and Richie Campbell

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Damon Wayans and Seann William Scott head the cast of this action drama, now well into its third and final season. Murtaugh (Wayans) takes a family holiday, but is pulled back into work after witnessing an alleged abduction. Meanwhile, Cole (Scott) is left to investigate a murder by himself. Later, however, the two cases begin to intersect. Then, Erica's mother, Senator Malick comes to town and stirs things up between her daughter, Cole and the case at hand. Kevin Rahm, Johnathan Fernandez and Michelle Mitchenor also star

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is thinks is out trick-or-treating for Halloween. But he unwittingly robs a bank instead of Weasel.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is a part-time firefighter reservist whose rescue mission for the day is to save a cat in a tree. In reality, the cat is none other than Fizz.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Thinking he is in the middle of a work-out at his local gym, Magoo inadvertently climbs onto a delivery boy's bicycle.

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go
programme.desc: When a popular vlogger gets trapped during an avalanche, International Rescue must find a way to carefully dig him out

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean tries to redecorate the hall, but the landlady's nasty one-eyed cat obstructs him at every turn - until he puts it in the dustbin

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Faced with a long shopping list from his formidable landlady, the hapless half-wit builds a giant motorised trolley from a petrol mower and pram wheels, hoping to get the job done in double-quick time

programme.title: Scrambled!
programme.desc: Two hours of children's fun and entertainment

programme.title: Mighty Mike
programme.desc: Mike is delighted when Iris invites him over for a cup of tea on the terrace, but with the raccoons to contend with, will he make it to his date on time

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig of the Creek follows a young boy and his two friends as they go on adventures in a world of untamed, kid-dominated wilderness in the creek.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Double bill. Robin gets amnesia and starts thinking that Hawkman is his mother. Then, it's the Teen Titans vs Titans East as the two teams compete for who gets Bumblebee

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: The gang learns of even bigger and even worse forces working against the Empress and the Kingdom of China and must come up with a plan to put a stop to them before it is too late.

programme.title: The Rubbish World of Dave Spud
programme.desc: The misadventures of underdog Dave Spud and his family. Dave is warned by local fortune teller Madam Donald that walking under a ladder will bring bad luck - he walks under one anyway, and soon a meteor is heading for Grimsby. It is up to Dave and his friend Robert Robot to catch it before everyone is squished.

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James serves up a feast of food for This Morning's resident medic Ranj Singh, including recipes for risotto, lemon sole, salmon en croute and rhubarb crumble cake. Plus, chefs Sat Bains and Bettina Campolucci Bordi drop by with delicious dishes of their own

programme.title: Simply Raymond Blanc
programme.desc: The chef shares his love of new produce from the gardens and explains why seasonality is important and why everyone should embrace it. From his Oxfordshire kitchen, he cooks pan-fried salmon with spinach and chive butter sauce, and rustles up a fricassee of wild mushrooms. Long-time friend Jean-Christophe Novelli pays a visit and bakes him an indulgent tarte tatin, and baked apple with caramel

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the Languedoc region, famous for its wine and the hearty, meaty dish cassoulet, and stops at a roadside fruit stall owned by a couple of British expats, before creating an unusual dish using melon and onion rings. He also wanders round a museum dedicated to Citroen 2CVs and cooks a steak on a barbecue in the blazing sunshine

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Bullard asks Barnaby to investigate the disappearance of a friend's daughter who was a member of the Oblong Foundation, a cult based at Malham Hall. Jones goes under cover as a new recruit to solve the mystery, but he and Barnaby soon start digging into an old case involving the death of a couple in a boat explosion, which could be linked to the missing woman. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with Will Knightley, Kevin Doyle, Holly Aird, Barbara Flynn and John Woodvine

programme.title: Six Nations Live
programme.desc: Ireland v England (Kick-off 4.45pm). Coverage of both teams' concluding match of the championship, held at Aviva Stadium. England prevailed 24-12 when the sides met at Twickenham last year and also won 32-20 here in 2019, but they have made an unconvincing defence of their title and Ireland will fancy their chances on this occasion despite also enduring a far from flawless campaign. Mark Pougatch presents, with analysis from Jonny Wilkinson, Clive Woodward, Brian O'Driscoll and Rory Best, and commentary by Nick Mullins, Lawrence Dallaglio and Geordan Murphy

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan is in the guest announcer booth, while Cat Deeley is in the studio for one of the riskiest Undercovers ever as Ant and Dec wreak havoc on their former SMTV Live co-star. After 20 years, the trio also reunite with a whole host of celebrity pals for the return of their much-loved sitcom Chums. Plus, Stephen Mulhern is back for another sporting challenge and a member of the virtual audience gets the chance to Win the Ads

programme.title: The Voice UK
programme.desc: Emma Willis presents the climax of the spinning-chair singing contest as the last four acts battle it out for the chance to win a recording contract, with coaches Tom Jones, Anne-Marie, Olly Murs and Will.i.am looking on

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show: Special Guests
programme.desc: Another selection of the most memorable moments from recent series of the talk show. Among the guests featured are David Attenborough, Sheridan Smith, Kevin Hart, Michael Caine, Julie Walters, Hugh Jackman, Liam Gallagher, Michelle Keegan, Ed Sheeran, Tiffany Haddish and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. After breaking John's mother out of a mental institution, the pair set out to avert a future nuclear war - pursued by an advanced prototype terminator with shape-changing powers. Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: David offers Nate some advice. Marlon and Rhona are proud. The Woolpack has a new name above its door

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: When Alina confesses she has fallen for him, Tyrone is overwhelmed. As Natasha returns from London, Nick is disappointed to realise his time with Sam has come to an end. Angered by Tracy's comments, Cathy posts her own views online about the McDonalds' fundraising efforts

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The body of 19-year-old apprentice electrician Dennis Bayliss is discovered washed up on the shore of a North Northumberland rural estate. The victim turns out to be the estranged son of Steph and Rob Bayliss who are left crippled by his death, having lost him once already when he abandoned them to seek out his biological father, Thomas Walken, who just happens to run a salmon farm on the spot where the body was found. Vera is forced to look closer at the strained relationships of Dennis's two families in order to find the truth about his death

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Roy Grace's career is at rock bottom and is in the last chance saloon running enquiries into long-forgotten cold cases with little prospect of success. Then he is approached by colleague DS Glen Branson to help investigate the disappearance of a Brighton property developer, who vanished without a trace on his stag night. Crime drama, starring John Simm and Richie Campbell

programme.title: FYI Extra

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Damon Wayans and Seann William Scott head the cast of this action drama, now well into its third and final season. Murtaugh (Wayans) takes a family holiday, but is pulled back into work after witnessing an alleged abduction. Meanwhile, Cole (Scott) is left to investigate a murder by himself. Later, however, the two cases begin to intersect. Then, Erica's mother, Senator Malick comes to town and stirs things up between her daughter, Cole and the case at hand. Kevin Rahm, Johnathan Fernandez and Michelle Mitchenor also star

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Double bill. Robin gets amnesia and starts thinking that Hawkman is his mother. Then, it's the Teen Titans vs Titans East as the two teams compete for who gets Bumblebee

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: The gang learns of even bigger and even worse forces working against the Empress and the Kingdom of China and must come up with a plan to put a stop to them before it is too late.

programme.title: The Rubbish World of Dave Spud
programme.desc: The misadventures of underdog Dave Spud and his family. Dave is warned by local fortune teller Madam Donald that walking under a ladder will bring bad luck - he walks under one anyway, and soon a meteor is heading for Grimsby. It is up to Dave and his friend Robert Robot to catch it before everyone is squished.

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James serves up a feast of food for This Morning's resident medic Ranj Singh, including recipes for risotto, lemon sole, salmon en croute and rhubarb crumble cake. Plus, chefs Sat Bains and Bettina Campolucci Bordi drop by with delicious dishes of their own

programme.title: Simply Raymond Blanc
programme.desc: The chef shares his love of new produce from the gardens and explains why seasonality is important and why everyone should embrace it. From his Oxfordshire kitchen, he cooks pan-fried salmon with spinach and chive butter sauce, and rustles up a fricassee of wild mushrooms. Long-time friend Jean-Christophe Novelli pays a visit and bakes him an indulgent tarte tatin, and baked apple with caramel

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the Languedoc region, famous for its wine and the hearty, meaty dish cassoulet, and stops at a roadside fruit stall owned by a couple of British expats, before creating an unusual dish using melon and onion rings. He also wanders round a museum dedicated to Citroen 2CVs and cooks a steak on a barbecue in the blazing sunshine

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Bullard asks Barnaby to investigate the disappearance of a friend's daughter who was a member of the Oblong Foundation, a cult based at Malham Hall. Jones goes under cover as a new recruit to solve the mystery, but he and Barnaby soon start digging into an old case involving the death of a couple in a boat explosion, which could be linked to the missing woman. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with Will Knightley, Kevin Doyle, Holly Aird, Barbara Flynn and John Woodvine

programme.title: Six Nations Live
programme.desc: Ireland v England (Kick-off 4.45pm). Coverage of both teams' concluding match of the championship, held at Aviva Stadium. England prevailed 24-12 when the sides met at Twickenham last year and also won 32-20 here in 2019, but they have made an unconvincing defence of their title and Ireland will fancy their chances on this occasion despite also enduring a far from flawless campaign. Mark Pougatch presents, with analysis from Jonny Wilkinson, Clive Woodward, Brian O'Driscoll and Rory Best, and commentary by Nick Mullins, Lawrence Dallaglio and Geordan Murphy

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan is in the guest announcer booth, while Cat Deeley is in the studio for one of the riskiest Undercovers ever as Ant and Dec wreak havoc on their former SMTV Live co-star. After 20 years, the trio also reunite with a whole host of celebrity pals for the return of their much-loved sitcom Chums. Plus, Stephen Mulhern is back for another sporting challenge and a member of the virtual audience gets the chance to Win the Ads

programme.title: The Voice UK
programme.desc: Emma Willis presents the climax of the spinning-chair singing contest as the last four acts battle it out for the chance to win a recording contract, with coaches Tom Jones, Anne-Marie, Olly Murs and Will.i.am looking on

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show: Special Guests
programme.desc: Another selection of the most memorable moments from recent series of the talk show. Among the guests featured are David Attenborough, Sheridan Smith, Kevin Hart, Michael Caine, Julie Walters, Hugh Jackman, Liam Gallagher, Michelle Keegan, Ed Sheeran, Tiffany Haddish and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. After breaking John's mother out of a mental institution, the pair set out to avert a future nuclear war - pursued by an advanced prototype terminator with shape-changing powers. Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fred thinks Ashley is a fool for letting Zoe stay with him. Deirdre decides to surprise Jon at work. Chris is pleased when Kevin offers him his job back

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz is stunned when Deirdre tells her about Jon's wife and children. Emily enjoys having Spider live with her. Nick and Leanne leave for Scotland together

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered near a driving school and the investigation proves a testing time for Morse and especially Lewis, who has the added distraction of being paired with an attractive female colleague. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Patrick Malahide, Tessa Wojtczak and Christopher Fulford

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with old friend Ariadne Oliver, who has been commissioned to stage a game of murder hunt at a summer fete in the grounds of Nasse House, the recently purchased home of wealthy financier Sir George Stubbs. However, the novelist's instincts tell her she's getting involved in something much darker - and she's proved right when the girl volunteering to play the part of the victim really does turn out to be dead. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Zoe Wanamaker, Sean Pertwee, Martin Jarvis, Sam Kelly, Sinead Cusack, Rosalind Ayres and Tom Ellis

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Since calling off his marriage to Louisa, Martin has begun to question what keeps him in Cornwall and realises that if he is ever to escape, he must conquer the blood phobia that ended his surgical career. Encouraged by aunt Joan's friend Barbara he tackles his fear, but after an accident the pair end up in hospital, where he bumps into his girlfriend from medical school. Later, the return of a familiar face shakes him up even more. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes, Stephanie Cole and Lia Williams

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Despite the doctor's unpleasant attitude toward her, Louisa applies for a job at the school - where she quickly notices something strange about the new headmaster's behaviour. Martin refers Pauline's aunt and uncle to Edith after they have trouble conceiving a baby, but her tests lead one of the couple to make a surprising confession. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz, with David Haig

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on a pagan sect steeped in ancient beliefs when a baby is found dead. As the detective investigates, he has to juggle family and work commitments, and finds that friendship and professionalism are pushed to the limit. Jack Shepherd stars, with Jimmy Yuill and Helen Masters

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Dorothy becomes concerned her grand-daughter Taisie is being influenced by Rachel, while Janet is mortified when Gill berates her for inappropriate behaviour toward young sergeant Rob. The detective duo are sent to investigate the death of a man in a nursing home after his daughter complains about the level of care he had been receiving. Will they find any evidence of foul play? Detective drama, starring Lesley Sharp, Suranne Jones and Danny Miller

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective's curiosity is aroused by the passengers on board a luxury cruise ship bound for Egypt - particularly a woman who appears inordinately offensive to her fellow travellers. When the vessel arrives at Alexandria, the irritating lady's body is discovered in her cabin - leaving the sleuth with a host of possible suspects to interrogate. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The members of an Oxford old boys' cricket team gather for their annual match, unaware that death is waiting at the crease to bowl one of them out for good. Morse sets out to find the culprit - helped as ever by the faithful Lewis, who demonstrates unexpected skill on the pitch. John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Sharon Maughan star in an episode scripted by Oscar-winning director Anthony Minghella

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A diary and a parking ticket are found at a murder scene in a multi-storey car park. It is not much to go on, but Morse soon links the clues to a crime of passion involving a jealous husband, his wife and her lover. On the personal front, the Oxford detective's feathers are ruffled by a woman he finds himself attracted to. John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Mel Martin and Amanda Hillwood star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: In a retrospective episode set immediately after the events of series two, Rachel faces further accusations of masterminding the fatal attack on ex-lover Nick and finds comfort in the arms of ever-faithful Sean, agreeing to marry him. Amid the wedding celebrations, Janet and Ade admit defeat and decide to split up for good, while Gill is duty bound to take action when she catches Pete in a compromising position. The detectives also investigate the case of a businessman suspected of murdering a homeless man

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy man whose double life left him vulnerable to exploitation. Away from work, Rachel's recent moment of indiscretion threatens to come back to haunt her when a confused Sean takes a phone call from her one-night stand, and after Ade is pushed into living with his girlfriend on a permanent basis, Janet asks her mother to move in

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, giving rise to fears that the so-called 'beast', a monster enshrined in local legend, has returned to wreak fresh havoc. Kersey ventures up onto the moors to investigate and does not return - so Wycliffe is forced to go it alone. Jack Shepherd and Jimmy Yuill star

programme.desc: Kevin and Sally enjoy being back together. Judy is upset when Zoe refuses to let her visit Katie. Ashley is horrified when Zoe offers him her body in return for taking her in

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy is cross-examined by Steve's barrister. Zoe is questioned about the night of the robbery. Graham tells Rachel about his wife's depression and suicide

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The slaughtermen arrive at an Aidensfield farm where a suspected case of foot-and-mouth disease has been reported, but receive a hostile reception. Nick is enlisted to help restore the peace - and gets drawn into a tragedy. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally considers a job which will take her away from the family home. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid believes he is in for a fortune when a friend mentions him in his will. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: When Chrissy receives two tickets for a Frank Sinatra concert, everyone wants to be her friend. Comedy, starring Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective finds himself investigating the strange and gruesome murder of an elderly psychiatrist. Elsewhere, Poirot's old friend Ariadne Oliver is being pressed to uncover the truth behind two decade-old deaths. As the pair dig deep for evidence, they soon discover that their separate investigations are linked and join forces to solve the overarching mystery. David Suchet, Zoe Wanamaker and Greta Scacchi star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An Army deserter arrives in the village following a bust-up with his sadistic sergeant and causes problems for the Rowans when he starts stealing food to survive. The fugitive is only discovered when Nick investigates a series of break-ins around the village. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is questioned about the horse theft. Paddy suffers following his night out. Kim arranges a mystery rendezvous. Graham is angry with Rachel when she makes fun of him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim heads to Home Farm for a final confrontation with Chris to get her money back, and things take a violent turn. Graham storms out after an argument with Rachel

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally does not like the idea of Kevin working with Natalie. Judy is horrified when Leanne tells the Rovers' customers that Judy bought Zoe's baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin refuses to sell the garage and asks Sally to trust him. Deirdre is furious when Jon tells her he has to work on New Year's Eve. Liz is thrilled when Mike offers her a job

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Called to investigate the murder of a brewery manager, Morse delves into the history of the generations-old family firm and discovers that several employees and shareholders stood to profit from the victim's death. The challenge facing him is to discern whether any of them would stoop to foul play. Guest starring Lionel Jeffries and John Bird

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with sidekick Captain Hastings (Hugh Fraser), secretary Miss Lemon (Pauline Moran) and Inspector Japp (Philip Jackson) in a case that plunges him into the world of global espionage as the Second World War looms. The public are in panic after the shocking death of Russian grandmaster Ivan Savaranoff during a game of chess. Poirot must try to determine the good guys from the bad in a complex plot that sees the main figures used like pawns. David Suchet stars in a story adapted by Mark Gatiss and Ian Hallard

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Chief Superintendent Jack Cornish goes missing and a recently embalmed body is discovered near an isolated farm track - could there be a link? As Hathaway goes on sabbatical in Kosovo, Lewis takes an awkward young constable under his wing to investigate the case. Guest starring Lucy Speed and Peter Davison, with Kevin Whately and Babou Ceesay

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, giving rise to fears that the so-called 'beast', a monster enshrined in local legend, has returned to wreak fresh havoc. Kersey ventures up onto the moors to investigate and does not return - so Wycliffe is forced to go it alone. Jack Shepherd and Jimmy Yuill star

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Having realised her marriage is a mistake, Rachel is still staying at Janet's and making excuses for her absence, but Sean isn't prepared to accept that things have gone so wrong, so quickly. Meanwhile, the investigation into Joe Bevan continues as the body count rises and the team faces the mammoth task of identifying the victims and determining the order in which they were murdered. Detective drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Sean Maguire

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood presents action from obscure motorsports, such as bus and caravan racing and ice speedway

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa is used as bait in a trap to lure an assassin out into the open. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Two sisters receive unwanted gifts at Christmas - severed human ears. Holmes is enlisted to discover where they came from - and uncovers a disturbing tale of deceit and infidelity. Jeremy Brett stars in his curtain call as the famous detective

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar tries to stop a crime ring forming a deadly alliance with psychology students who plan murders. Drama, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A sergeant is injured in a shooting incident and names his informant as the person responsible. However, the suspected man's girlfriend insists that the officer is corrupt and steals away to be with her lover, who has gone into hiding. Lynda La Plante guest stars

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell presents a preview of day three of Cheltenham Festival, including the Stayers' Hurdle and the Ryanair Chase

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Daleys move into the high-spending world of corporate hospitality and find themselves caught between glamour and danger. Samantha Womack guest stars, alongside George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: The master baker who turns out a traditional regional delicacy with a Greek twist and the craftsmen who turn raw hides into handcrafted saddles

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey are joined by former Olympic 400m hurdle champion Sally Gunnell and reality star-turned-photographer Anna 'AK' Kelle on the competitive angling show, heading to Essex to try their hands at pole fishing

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar rescues a Russian damsel in distress and agrees to help her fend off art thieves eager to get their hands on her da Vinci masterpieces. Cult adventure series, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A security guard is murdered during a payroll snatch, and Regan and Carter are called in to support local investigating officers. However, bad blood between the maverick detective inspector and the force's chief superintendent going back several years manifests itself in an old allegation of corruption being rekindled. Richard Griffiths features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman in the final episode of the crime drama

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A murder witness is placed under Steed's protection and Tara is the only one who knows where he has hidden her - and is kidnapped by the culprits and held at a sinister hospital

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's brother-in-law Brian suffers a bout of depression, affecting everyone on the manor, and leading the dodgy dealer to make some dubious deals including giving one punter a £500 discount. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a company manufacturing the hand-sewn Union Jacks seen flying over Buckingham Palace, and a Devon forge that produces wood burning stoves. Plus, an insight into the creation of handmade marbles and the secret recipe of a British kitchen cupboard staple dating back almost 200 years. Ricky Tomlinson narrates

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of family and friends from Kent answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as one-time Coronation Street actor Jimi Mistry (Khalid Nazir), former Emmerdale star Gemma Atkinson (Carly Hope), Loose Women's Nadia Sawalha and veteran actor James Cosmo pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser, in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for the charity of their choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: A look at the underwater predators the crews and skippers encounter, revealing how they trap and destroy their prey, and play havoc with catch rates

programme.title: Step Brothers (2008)
programme.desc: Brennan and Dale are two 40-year-old men who have never flown the nest. All that changes when Brennan's mother marries Dale's father, and the spoiled sons are forced to share a room. Comedy, with Will Ferrell, John C Reilly, Mary Steenburgen and Richard Jenkins

programme.desc: Nightclub owner Paul Verrier is tricked into believing that the Saint is trying to kill him, so contacts various people to murder Templer. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of robberies is committed on affluent couples travelling down a country lane, and it transpires two of the suspected offenders are wealthy themselves. Lesley-Anne Down guest stars alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces extended highlights of the quarter-final match from Stade Pierre-Mauroy in Lille, France. Commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Craig Bellamy

programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of four races from Uttoxeter, including the 3.35 Marston's 61 Deep Midlands Grand National, and three races from Kempton Park. With analysis by Andrew Thornton and Luke Harvey, betting news from Rishi Persad, commentary by Richard Hoiles and reports from Natalie Green

programme.title: The Sea Wolves (1980)
programme.desc: The German Navy use three Goa-based vessels to attack Allied shipping, and their British counterparts cannot retaliate as they are moored in neutral waters. A group of retired officers living in India unofficially returns to duty to deal with the threat. Fact-based Second World War adventure, starring Gregory Peck, Roger Moore, David Niven, Trevor Howard, Barbara Kellerman and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)

Western, with Yul Brynner, Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, Robert Vaughn, James Coburn and Eli Wallach

The film charts Caroline's career, from stage school to some of the biggest shows on TV, and hears from family and colleagues - including Dermot O'Leary and Olly Murs - about the pressures that fame, mental health issues, press and social media had on Caroline

Plus, the a husband-and-wife team in Majorca who invested big money after losing one of their business partners and a catch-up with a fruit juice entrepreneur on the French Riviera, who has tried to expand into new markets.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, owned by Gareth and Frances Jenkins. The building was once an architectural gem, but over the years has been the victim of unsympathetic modernisations, making it unrecognisable from its 1930s heyday. The challenge is to strip away the ugly accretions to reveal the house in all its glory - while also making it suitable for modern family living. Plus, George visits a stunning seaside home and Britain's biggest collection of neon signs

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: George Clarke meets a couple who are converting a 400-year-old Spanish palace into a boutique hotel and family home. Nick and Lesley Vallance wanted a fresh start after the collapse of their business in the UK and decided to leave the country to begin the two-year project. The plucky pair, who cannot speak Spanish, refuse to let spiralling costs and their disgruntled children spoil their dream

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Our B&B Dream
programme.desc: Lisa Holloway visits Alan who has taken over a pub with eight neglected bedrooms in Stirchley, Birmingham. Despite 18 years in the trade, Alan has no idea how to run a B&B, so Lisa steps into the breach to take him in hand, promising to rejuvenate his business

programme.desc: Spa owner Aya accidentally bumps into a distraught woman who turns out to be a sorority sister. Learning she has been dumped by the man she just moved to LA to be with, Aya invites Taryn to move in with her - unaware the woman now sharing her home is in fact a liar and a ruthless killer. Thriller, starring Haley Webb and Haley Pullos

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of medical emergency teams in the A&E department of Barnsley Hospital, beginning as severe weather conditions place it under even more stress than usual. Dr Julian tends to pensioner Brian who was brought in after breaking his ankle walking his dog in the snow, and the medic also sees former miner Andrew, who has a chronic lung condition. Paediatric consultant Dr Jane is called into action when four-year-old Teddy is rushed in after gashing his head in a sledging accident

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ziggy finds a way to move on from the heartbroken Dean. With Martha's mental health spiralling, Irene and Marilyn try to talk her down

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Jon Bentley takes TV duo Dick and Dom on a day-trip to find out which is the best 42-inch TV. Plus, Ortis Deley and Georgie Barrat test washing machines. Craig Charles tests a piece of tech used to train dogs, and impressionist Luke Kempner attempts to overhaul his online streaming game

programme.title: Kate Humble's Coastal Britain
programme.desc: The presenter walks a 13-mile stretch of Yorkshire coastline. Starting at the highest point along this coast, Kate heads down into the fishing village of Staithes, which was once home to one of north Yorkshire's largest fishing fleets. In Runswick Bay, she takes to the sea with the volunteers in the newest rescue boat. Kate then heads on to Whitby, which inspired Bram Stoker's Dracula after he stayed there in 1890

programme.title: Russia vs the World
programme.desc: Fiona Shaw narrates this exploration of Russia's medieval origins through to its bloody expansion to become the biggest country in the world. It's a tale that set the scene for one of the world's most enigmatic figures, and his vision of modern Russia. From a tyrannical grip on ordinary citizens to rampant corruption at the highest level, this film reveals the secrets behind holding the world's largest country together in a narrative that takes in the KGB and its ancestors as well as Stalin, murder and gulags

programme.title: Conspiracy
programme.desc: Documentary exploring popular conspiracy theories surrounding the Cold War, including how the lies of one man, former head of intelligence for the German army Reinhard Gehlen, moved the world to within hours of nuclear destruction. Theories related to the potential devastation of the 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis are also examined, along with suspicions associated with the assassination of Italy's former prime minister Aldo Morro, who some claim was killed not by communist revolutionists but by a sinister underground army created by Nato

programme.title: Inside the Nazi Mega Bunker
programme.desc: A look at the extraordinary defences and kill zones that surrounded Hitler's bunker in Berlin, a subterranean safehouse protected by 13-foot-thick walls

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentine's Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joey's spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: Inspector Kate Ford becomes worried about a staffie-cross that appears to be dangerously underweight. The owner claims to regularly feed the dog, and Kate is desperate to get an appointment with a vet, which proves to be no easy task. At Block Fen RSPCA, staff work to rehabilitate a lurcher that was tied to a fence and abandoned, and a trainee police dog competes against more experienced sniffer hounds in a mission to locate concealed firearms

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell sets out on a journey to discover how six of Britain's most stunning bridges were designed and built. Completed in 1890, the Forth Rail Bridge now carries around 200 trains every day. The last of the great Victorian engineering triumphs, it has grown to symbolise Scotland as much as Edinburgh Castle, bagpipes or kilts. But, as Rob learns, this incredible engineering achievement was born from the tragedy of the 1879 Tay Bridge disaster, and 73 deaths were connected with its construction and immediate aftermath

programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joey's revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebe's new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey avoids all contact with Rachel, so she tries to repair their friendship by telling him a big lie. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. Meanwhile, Phoebe's boyfriend drives the gang crazy with his boundless enthusiasm. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. Rachel persuades him to reconsider so that he can mention her, though Joey insists all his friends be present to ensure he does not say anything too controversial this time

programme.title: Oliver! (1968)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning musical version of the stage play based on Charles Dickens' classic tale about a lonely workhouse orphan who ends up on the cold streets of London, where he falls under the wing of petty crook Fagin and his gang of young backstreet thieves. Featuring the iconic songs Food, Glorious Food, Consider Yourself, As Long as He Needs Me and You've Got to Pick a Pocket or Two. Starring Ron Moody, Mark Lester, Oliver Reed, Jack Wild, Harry Secombe, Shani Wallis and Leonard Rossiter

However, unfamiliar with the ways of love, they think the best way to get hitched is to kidnap their prospective brides. Musical Western, directed by Stanley Donen, starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Jeff Richards and Julie Newmar

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers (1954)
programme.desc: A cowboy from a large backwoods family decides to get married, prompting his six hellraising brothers to follow suit. However, unfamiliar with the ways of love, they think the best way to get hitched is to kidnap their prospective brides. Musical Western, directed by Stanley Donen, starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Jeff Richards and Julie Newmar

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The presenter explores more of what Australia has to offer, beginning in the hotspot Surfer's Paradise - although her hopes of taking to the waves are dashed when an unexpected storm hits. She does, however, have a go at indoor skydiving and tries various relaxation therapies before heading to the west coast, where she begins her cruise on the ship featured in the remake of cult TV show The Love Boat. Also on the itinerary are visits to the war memorials of Albany, the starting point of the Anzac campaign in the First World War, and Fremantle Prison, where she heads into spooky underground tunnels built by prisoners

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: The comedian ventures east of the Pennines on a 126-mile journey that begins at the North Yorkshire village of Runswick Bay, where she goes hunting for a rare gemstone called Whitby Jet. Susan samples the local cod and chips before exploring the gothic ruins of Whitby Abbey - famed for inspiring some of the most dramatic scenes in Bram Stoker's Dracula. After a spell at Mother Shipton's Cave - the oldest tourist attraction in England - she meets up with a group whose members reconstruct Roman gladiatorial battles in York. Finally, Susan ventures to Malham Cove, a huge curving amphitheatre-shaped cliff

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: Life at the hotel that sits above Sunset Boulevard in Los Angeles. Also known as the Pink Palace, it has been greeting guests for 107 years, from reclusive billionaires to Hollywood royalty. The hotel has seen secrets and scandal, and been the place for countless movie moguls to cut a deal. Director of global guest relations Steven Boggs takes cameras 'backstage', while executive chef Michael Santoro shows the dish that is almost as famous as the hotel itself

programme.title: Grace Kelly: The Hollywood Years
programme.desc: A look at the movie career of Oscar-winning actress Grace Kelly, drawing on archive film and interviews with historians, biographers and journalists to chart her rise from bit-part player to becoming a superstar of the Golden Age of Hollywood, starring in High Noon and High Society as well as Alfred Hitchcock's Dial M for Murder, Rear Window and To Catch a Thief

programme.title: Princess Alice: The Royals' Greatest Secret
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the Queen's mother-in-law and Prince Philip's mother, Princess Alice of Battenberg, featuring archive footage and interviews with those who know her story best. Her remarkable life saw her born deaf and diagnosed with schizophrenia, sent to a mental asylum, given controversial electroshock treatment and treated by Sigmund Freud. She also found an order of nursing nuns in Greece, before finally coming to live at Buckingham Palace, with the Queen

programme.title: Sweet Home Alabama (2002)
programme.desc: A successful New York fashion designer excitedly planning her wedding has to return to her home town in Alabama to persuade her first husband to sign the papers to finalise their divorce. However, seeing her childhood sweetheart stirs up old feelings, leaving the bride-to-be in a quandary over her future. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Patrick Dempsey, Josh Lucas and Candice Bergen

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: When two dogs are left confined to one room without food or water, Inspector Anthony Pulfer is straight on the scene. Cameras also follow Snoopy, a young lurcher who was just skin and bones when spotted by three members of the public

programme.title: Shock Docs
programme.desc: Documentary exploring some of Britain's most bizarre parent-child relationships, where the mums and dads will do anything to look better than their kids. Those featured include 39-year-old Georgina, who was once a frumpy mum but has now followed daughter Kayla by becoming the image of a Barbie doll, complete with fake boobs and lips. Forty-five-year-old Paul is constantly muscling in on the action with his 18-year-old bodybuilder son Kyle, and former glamour model Charmaine loves flaunting what she has, much to the embarrassment of 14-year-old Yasmin. But when she decides to go back to modelling, how will her daughter react?

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Compilation of interior design tips from previous editions of the series, revealing how style guru Ann Maurice has helped homeowners sell their properties

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards

programme.title: Rawhide (1951)
programme.desc: Outlaws hold staff and a passenger and her baby hostage at a remote stagecoach station while awaiting the arrival of a shipment of $100,000 in gold bullion. The nervous captives try to stay calm, but the tension between the gang leader and a jumpy henchman grows fraught, ending in a frantic shoot-out - with the infant in the thick of the fray. Western, starring Tyrone Power, Susan Hayward and Jack Elam

programme.title: Hatari! (1962)
programme.desc: A group of reckless animal trappers travels through the wilds of Africa, but the arrival of a beautiful photographer looks set to cause upheaval among the group. Comedy adventure, starring John Wayne, Red Buttons, Hardy Kruger, Elsa Martinelli and Michele Girardon

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Nobody's Fool (2018)
programme.desc: The recently paroled Tanya suspects her high-flying sister Danica is in an online relationship with a man who may not be what he seems. Eventually Danica, her friend Kalli and Tanya attempt to get to the bottom of the mystery. Writer/director Tyler Perry's romantic comedy, starring Tiffany Haddish, Tika Sumpter and Whoopi Goldberg

programme.title: Dance with a Stranger (1985)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about former prostitute Ruth Ellis, who embarks on a passionate affair with a racing driver. When he announces he's to marry someone else, she is driven to despair and resorts to murderous measures. But her actions make her the last woman to be hanged in Britain. Drama, starring Miranda Richardson, Rupert Everett, Stratford Johns and Ian Holm

programme.title: How Green Was My Valley (1941)
programme.desc: Residents of a Welsh mining community at the start of the 20th century struggle to come to terms with the decline in their traditional way of life. Oscar-winning drama, starring Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara, Donald Crisp and Roddy McDowall

programme.title: Only the Valiant (1951)
programme.desc: A tough cavalry officer selects six unlikely comrades to undertake a vital mission to defend an isolated fort against marauding Apaches. His men's initial hostility soon turns to respect, however, as they realise his wily ways will see them through the conflict. Western adventure based on a novel by Charles Marquis Warren, starring Gregory Peck, Barbara Payton, Ward Bond and Lon Chaney Jr

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: The Black Arrow (1948)
programme.desc: A knight returning home from fighting in the Wars of the Roses returns home to discover his father has been murdered. A family friend fighting for the other side has been blamed for the crime, but the knight tries to prove his wicked uncle is responsible. Swashbuckling adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel, starring Louis Hayward and Janet Blair

programme.title: The Way Way Back (2013)
programme.desc: An introverted teenager joins his mother and her overbearing boyfriend on an awkward family holiday. He befriends a free-spirited employee at the nearby water park, and the relationship inspires him to assert his independence for the first time. Comedy drama, starring Liam James, Sam Rockwell, Steve Carell, Toni Collette and Allison Janney

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bourne's own father's involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: Blade of the Immortal (2017)
programme.desc: An immortal warrior is hired by a young woman to avenge the murder of her father. Director Takashi Miike's fantasy drama, starring Takuya Kimura, Hana Sugisaki and Sota Fukushi

programme.title: Devil's Due (2014)
programme.desc: A newlywed couple are surprised to discover they are expecting their first child soon after their honeymoon. The husband decides to document his wife's pregnancy on film, but witnesses her undergoing a strange transformation that leaves him wondering if there is something supernatural about the unborn baby. Horror, starring Allison Miller and Zach Gilford

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw

programme.title: Masters of the Universe (1987)
programme.desc: The heroic warrior He-Man sets out to bring an end to the evil Skeletor's reign of terror, but is transported to Earth by a cosmic key, with his arch enemy's henchman in hot pursuit. Fantasy adventure, starring Dolph Lundgren, Frank Langella, Meg Foster and Billy Barty

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still (2008)
programme.desc: An alien arrives on Earth, accompanied by an awesomely powerful robot, on a fateful mission - to decide if the human race deserves to continue - and if not, to wipe it out. The visitor is imprisoned in a military facility, but a scientist helps him escape, hoping to prove that mankind is worth saving. Sci-fi drama remake, starring Keanu Reeves and Jennifer Connelly

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed

programme.title: Here Comes Hell (2019)
programme.desc: It's the 1930s and group of old acquaintances are invited to a spooky, dilapidated country pile for a dinner party where everything goes to hell. Comedy horror, starring Tom Bailey, Maureen Bennett and Alfred Bradley

programme.title: The Love Witch (2016)
programme.desc: Modern-day witch Elaine Parks is starting a new life in the small town of Arcata, where she aims to use potions, concoctions and spells to enchant her perfect man. Comedy horror, starring Samantha Robinson, with Laura Waddell, Gian Keys, Robert Seeley and Jennifer Ingrum

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow has a meeting with one of Kyra's teachers and finds out she has an aptitude for chemistry. Meanwhile, Andre Jr shakes things up at Stevens & Lido

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is upset that Jack and Diane are getting the same level of education about black history that he got when he was growing up, so he is asked to make a presentation to the school

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker compete for the attention of a girl they met while out clubbing, both taking home her phone number, before eventually battling on the dance floor to see who should date her. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben begs supermum Izzy to let him join her parenting class, so she meets him for a one-on-one tutorial to bring him up to speed. Meanwhile, Tucker and Danny transform the laundry room into a 'man cave', and Bonnie and Riley find themselves in a spot of trouble thanks to baby Emma

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry team up to form a rap super-group just like the Beastie Boys. Beverly puts pressure on Murray to let her redesign the kitchen, but when he refuses to allow it she comes up with a devious plan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them.
